creator: g-nakai@internetsolutions.co.jp
text:
I have made the port of GYVE, GNU Yellow Vector Editor.
GYVE is the replacement of Adobe Illustrator and Corel Draw.
Please enjoy...

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
